title: Epidemiology & Pandemic Dynamics

sir.why: β,γ = rate constants; I(t) ~ exp((β-γ)t) near exponential growth phase = EML-2

r0.object: Basic reproduction number R₀ = β/γ and herd immunity threshold

at_threshold_R0_1.why: R₀=1: bifurcation = EML-∞; shadow=2 (endemic level = EML-2)

superspreader.why: Negative binomial with overdispersion k: P(X=n) involves complex moments = EML-3

tipping.object: Pandemic tipping points (variant emergence, lockdown release)

variant_emergence.type: TYPE 2 Horizon (escape variant = sudden fitness jump)

wave_structure.formula: Wave n: I_n(t) ~ exp(r_n·t): each wave EML-2
wave_structure.why: Each wave = EML-2; transition between waves = TYPE 2 Horizon

semiring_verdicts.new_finding: Superspreader overdispersion = EML-3 (Gamma function): explains why pandemic prediction is hard — cross-type product with deterministic SIR

key_theorem: Epidemic Semiring Theorem (S297): SIR/SEIR = EML-2 closed (exponential growth/decay). R₀=1 threshold = TYPE 2 Horizon, shadow=2. NEW FINDING: Superspreader events = EML-3 (negative binomial via Gamma function). Superspreader(EML-3) ⊗ SIR(EML-2) = EML-∞: EXPLAINS PANDEMIC UNPREDICTABILITY. The cross-type product of stochastic overdispersion (EML-3) and deterministic transmission (EML-2) makes precise pandemic forecasting fundamentally EML-∞. Vaccination waning: EML-2. Pandemic waves: each wave EML-2; transitions = TYPE 2 Horizons. EPIDEMIC DEPTH LADDER: SIR(EML-2) → R₀=1(TYPE2) → Superspreader(EML-3) → Full pandemic(EML-∞).
rabbit_hole_log: SIR: EML-2 closed (exponential growth, logistic saturation)
R₀=1: TYPE 2 Horizon; shadow=2 (endemic level real-valued)
NEW: superspreader = EML-3 (Gamma function in negative binomial)
Each wave: EML-2; wave transitions: TYPE 2 Horizons
